title: Eldegoss End-form
description: Adding an End form for Eldegoss
body:
# **An End-form for Eldegoss!**
- This addon adds an end reigonal form for Eldegoss based on the chorus flower!
- This new form of Eldegoss is now a Psychic/Grass type, and can now float using psychic energy!
![Eldegoss_end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fedb61e2657ecbe7b154b94ccacf94380d8efdec_0.webp)
__________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **How to get it**
Getting this new form of Eldegoss is not a simple task, and this evolution require special conditions to be achived
1. Just like with the galar Eldegoss, you will need your Gossifleur to be at least level 20 in order to evolve it
2. by openin the party menu, and heading to the "other" section in the summery screen, A new gauge will appear, the "Blossom Rate" gauge
![blossom_rate_empty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfb53d6d0cd0005e901c0e78b5f8b33e1cf6e082.png)
**You can fill up this gauge by giving 73 chorus fruits to your Gossifleur!(Chorus flowers can also be used to fill the gauge faster!)**
![blossom_rate_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4712ddfdd7ad25648f4df0cbe4427668fbdbde8e_0.webp)
3. You must be in the End dimension for this evolution to appear
If you sucsessfully met all the conditions, you will now be able to evolve your Gossifleur to the End form of Eldegoss!
________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **How to install**
1. Download the datapack for your version.
2. Add the file to your resource packs, and enable it.
3. Add the file to your datapack under saves/[worldname]/datapacks
4. Select the world and play!
________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **Where does it spawn?**
- The Eldegoss Tree(this is a side datapack for the End form of Eldegoss!)
